full_text:
Research Progress

Project Title: Single-cell and spatial omics integration to reveal chemoresistance mechanisms in ovarian cancer

Owner Name(s): Sara Palomino
Start Date: 2024 
Expected Completion Date: 2027

GitHub Repository (if applicable):

Project Overview

We aim to define a integration method for cycif and scRNASeq data.

For this aim, we are going to use data from

sciset (Cycif + scRNASeq)

cell cycle (Cycif)

eyeMT (GEomx)

Related Files

All related files to this project are stored in L-345/Data/18_kuijjer_Collab

This folder at the same time contains several subfolders:

00_scRNASeq

01_Cycif

02_GEOMx

03_Presentations

04_NMF

05_Literature

Cancer_paper

Cavachon_paper

AT the same time folders in bold should be structured following the order:

00_Data

01_Scripts

02_Results

Results

Notes
